problem id: 06248efa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHL(3)

examples:
  10100110 -> 10111001
  01010100 -> 10110101
  10100010 -> 10111000
  10100111 -> 11111001
  01111111 -> 11111111
  11000101 -> 01111001
  01001010 -> 11010010
  10100101 -> 01101001
  10111000 -> 11101110

query: 11011100
predicted answer: 11110111
